name: Sylus
description:
“I was starting to think you wouldn’t show.” | In which Sylus gets injured.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

In the N109 Zone, struggles for power are constant and never-ending. The Harbingers are just another group he’ll end up squashing in due time, but they got the jump on him today. Forced to retreat to a safehouse, his body works tirelessly on patching up his injuries. But his body can only take so much, and his soul works better with its other half around.
